_bankroll_doctrine_2026_05_04: Bankroll truth comes solely from on-chain wallet via src.runtime.bankroll_provider.current() (5-min stale-cache window). Removed in this cleanup: fixed config-bankroll authority and temporary per-trade/aggregate cap rails. Smoke testing must run as a separate one-off script, not as a perma-gate that throttles real live trading. Per-cycle exposure discipline now lives in posture / RiskGuard / max-exposure gates only.
_low_purity_doctrine_2026_05_07: LOW Platt has no contract-bin-preserving fallback proof yet. Operator-approved (PR #93, 2026-05-07): if the exact LOW primary bucket is missing, UNVERIFIED, QUARANTINED, or below the live n_eff floor (calibration.maturity_thresholds level2), the live read seam returns RAW_UNCALIBRATED (level 4) rather than borrowing another cluster's Platt transform or rescuing via the legacy metric-only LOW data_version. Rationale: legacy LOW buckets were built under a different local-day construction law than the contract-window v2 authority; silent fallback would mix incommensurable training corpora into live sizing decisions. HIGH retains the existing season-pool fallback (its construction law is stable across legacy and v2). Reference: src/calibration/manager.py::_candidate_data_versions_for_metric_source, get_calibrator LOW early-return.

ensemble._n_mc_note: Runtime per-trade Monte Carlo iterations. Bumped 2026-04-29 from 5000 (LAW 4 forbidden move 7 floor) to 10000 for tighter per-trade SE (0.0071 -> 0.005 at p=0.5). Training calibration_pairs_v2 was rebuilt at n_mc=5000 on 2026-04-29; LAW 4 derivation shows that aggregate Platt fit difference between 5000 and 10000 is < 1e-3 sigma (label noise dominates). Future re-rebuild at 10000 is queued in backlog for full pipeline symmetry but is empirically not load-bearing for fit quality.
ensemble._min_members_floor_rationale_2026_05_19: ECMWF Open Data partial dissemination at 48-50 is statistically equivalent to full 51 for variance estimation under our Monte Carlo strategies. Strict 51-only gate caused 40-45% systematic discard for weeks. Floor of 40 keeps fail-closed for genuinely degraded ensembles (< 40 = unreliable variance) while admitting statistically-viable partial ensembles.

probability_sanity._probability_sanity_note_2026_05_23: P0 follow-up §4: thresholds for validate_high_distribution (day0 HIGH sanity gate). point_bucket_high_prob/min_member_support guard the POINT_BUCKET_HIGH_PROB_WITHOUT_MEMBER_SUPPORT gate; low_price_threshold/low_price_high_prob guard EXTREME_MARKET_DISAGREEMENT_LOW_PRICE_HIGH_PROB. Values equal the prior hardcoded constants — externalized for operator tuning without behavior change. The validator falls back to these defaults if this block is absent.

probability_edge_bin_sanity._note_2026_05_24: LIVE-PROB-P0 §F operator binding spec (2026-05-23); apply-metrics enforcement added 2026-05-24. GATE SEMANTICS: pure market-deference — any strictly-sub-floor (0 < p_mkt < 0.05) edge bin with cal/mkt ratio>=3.0 in a contiguous tail run>=2 is REJECTED. BIMODAL PROTECTION: bins with p_raw>=0.05 AND p_mkt>=0.05 (market and members agree on the secondary mode) PASS unconditionally — at the exact equality boundary p_mkt==0.05, BIMODAL PROTECTION takes precedence. For bins with p_mkt strictly below 0.05 the market disagrees regardless of member count; rejection applies and member support appears in telemetry only. APPLY-METRICS: hard mode fires when metric IN apply_to_metrics (i.e. HIGH). LOW is not hard-applied by this gate until validated; it can appear only as telemetry, not as an intermediate execution state. apply_to_strategies is ADVISORY METADATA ONLY — NOT a hard gate filter. Excluding any active live strategy (e.g. opening_inertia, the highest-volume live strategy) would create a phantom hole. The hard gate applies to ALL non-day0 strategies for the listed metric(s). FP=0 proven for HIGH across all strategies. Authority: /Users/leofitz/.claude/jobs/866db2ea/IMPL_SPEC_operator.md §F.

edli._legacy_bias_maze_removed_note: SINGLE TRUTH (bias-maze strip 2026-06-17): removed the legacy bias/de-bias flag maze under the operator single-truth law (live q runs on the raw precise multi-model fused center, no statistical de-bias layer, no bias flags). Removed keys: edli_bias_correction_enabled (inert p_raw bias-shift), edli_emos_sole_calibrator_enabled (regime now UNCONDITIONAL for non-day0), bias_decay_kelly_haircut_enabled + bias_decay_threshold_c/_f + bias_decay_kelly_factor (legacy ensemble-bias Kelly haircut, inert on the live spine), and their notes. edli_emos_ci_live_enabled / edli_emos_shadow_ledger_enabled were already absent (never present). Code: _spine_debias_authority unconditional identity; _emos_regime / monitor _monitor_emos_regime_enabled unconditional; _maybe_apply_edli_bias_correction / _maybe_bias_decay_kelly_haircut / _maybe_override_lcb_with_emos_ci / _write_emos_shadow_ledger + call sites removed; main calibration-coverage contract is a logged no-op. Modules deleted: settlement_residual_debias.py, emos_ci_license.py, emos_ci_shadow.py.
edli._q_lcb_settlement_coverage_gate_note: Phase-2 K3 is LIVE safety gating. The live q_lcb LCB is licensed against the REALIZED settlement win-rate in its band (settlement_outcomes graded ONLY through the spine grade_receipt): settlement_backward_coverage_check returns LICENSED (q_lcb unchanged) | UNLICENSED (shrink q_lcb to realized-1pp, calibration_source SETTLEMENT_ISOTONIC) | INSUFFICIENT_DATA (<min_n settled obs -> unchanged + WARN). K<<N: the coverage verdict is the EMOS k_cov INPUT (src/calibration/emos_ci_license.py), NOT a 7th coverage layer atop the existing flags. The ARM gate reads the coverage verdict UNCONDITIONALLY (arm_gate_coverage_blocks): arming requires coverage_ratio not None and |ratio-1|<0.10, and blocks on UNLICENSED.
edli._replacement_0_1_fused_q_shape_note: 2026-06-09 operator-directed promotion (the 'optimal final mathematical form'): the replacement q is built DIRECTLY from N(mu*, sigma_pred) via emos.bin_probability_settlement (ONE integrator), replacing the retired member-vote shape and anchor_weight heuristic on the replacement path. Evidence: settled-cell experiment n=39; old member-vote shape put EXACTLY ZERO on the winning bin in 11/39; LogLoss 11.07->1.51, hit 25.6%->46.2%; mu* MAE 0.77C vs anchor 1.27C. sigma_pred = sqrt(fused_sd^2 + walk-forward fused-center residual std^2), floor 1.0C.
edli._mass_enable_note_2026_06_09: Operator directive 2026-06-09 ('全部打开') + flag-implementation review verdicts (/tmp/flag_implementation_review.md): ENABLED q_lcb_settlement_coverage_gate (verified wired, decision-level, only lowers LCB, fail-open). DELETED stale_book_directional_trading_enabled (zero consumers in src/, dead key; OpeningStaleQuoteFOK never instantiated live) and mainstream_agreement_enforce_on_submit (operator: manual test item). The forecast_sharpness_gate (Wave-1 2026-06-12) was DELETED ENTIRELY — at 1.5x multiplier it suppressed edges for 50/54 cities (season-blended MAE defect); if sharpness ever matters it must be rebuilt inside calibrated q, never as a veto. Wave-2 2026-06-12 DELETED (settlement-refuted, code + key + tests removed): the typed-BiasTreatment DAY0-Kelly correction flag (would have changed DAY0 Kelly sizes; branch deleted) and the replacement_0_1 EB anchor-bias correction flag (settlement-refuted wrong-set; src/calibration/replacement_eb_bias.py module deleted). The three settlement-σ-floor flags (enabled / required / replacement-qlcb) were MERGED to one per-cell data-availability construction rule (Wave-2 item 6). NOTE: legacy edli_bias_correction_enabled + bias_decay haircut are INERT on the primary FORECAST lane while edli_emos_sole_calibrator_enabled=true (bias maze bypassed); they fire only on DAY0/emos-miss.
edli._pause_note_2026_06_10: RESOLVED 2026-06-10: operator unpause after the Milan-incident defense stack landed (direction-law admission gate, COVERAGE_UNLICENSED_TAIL, mode-consistent EV with execution_mode_intent as submit authority + SUBMIT_ABORTED_MODE_FLIPPED, fused q_lcb/q_ucb materialization with FUSED_NORMAL_BOUNDS_MISSING live-ineligibility, maker bid-improve + post_only + 25% spread guard, fee V2 source). Superseded by the 2026-06-12 operator directive: day0 is live under forecast_plus_day0; remaining-window Day0 q is live probabilistic observation belief when the Day0 source/quality gates pass.
edli._unpause_note_2026_06_12: 02:5xZ recovery complete: boot deadlock (wallet fail-closed crash + UNRESOLVED_SUBMIT_UNKNOWN/LIVE_CAP_RESERVED from PARTIAL commands) resolved via scripts/resolve_edli_unknown_by_authenticated_absence.py (venue absence proof, cap released); armed trio restored.

calibration._transfer_logit_sigma_scale_note: Chain-rule logit slope at p=0.5 used to map OOS Brier-diff to logit-space σ for cross-domain Platt transfer uncertainty (Phase α, Issue 2.4). Default 4.0. Operator-tunable once OOS Brier-diff corpus is available.

sizing._kelly_multiplier_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 500+ settlements using empirical edge-estimation error and optimal Kelly fraction. 2026-06-08 operator: 0.25->0.125 proving phase. 2026-06-09 operator: 0.125->0.0625 (realized 10-40 above envelope). 2026-06-10 operator: 0.0625->0.125 RESTORED — 1/16 was over-weakened: realized stakes ~3.5 USD fell below the 5-share venue min order on mid-price NO bins. 2026-06-16 operator: 0.125->0.0625 HALVED — first live spine harvest sized $56 (Moscow buy_no), WAY over the $5-15 per-order envelope; halve back to 1/16. 2026-06-16 (b): 0.0625->0.0125 — halving was the WRONG-MAGNITUDE lever. Live formula is family_total$ = bankroll x mult x f*, f* = (q_lcb-cost)/(1-cost). At bankroll $1286 and real harvest edges f* in [0.47 Singapore, 0.70 Moscow], 0.0625 still yields $38-56 (2.5-4.5x over $15). To land the $5-15 envelope across the realistic f* range [0.30,0.85]: $15 ceiling at f*max 0.85 => mult <= 15/(1286*0.85)=0.0137; chose 0.0125 (clean, margin). Lands f*0.85->$13.7, Moscow f*0.70->$11.3, Singapore f*0.47->$7.6, thin f*0.30->$4.8. NOTE the structural tension: a 3x envelope ($5-15) cannot hold across Kelly's full f* range under one scalar once bankroll grows; revisit (not a cap) per equity growth + first settled fills. 2026-06-16 (c): 0.0125->0.02 — LIVE thin-edge families that actually post orders came in at f*~0.19 (q_lcb~0.71/cost~0.64, thinner than the assumed 0.30 floor), landing at the 5-share venue min ~$3 (operator: too small; a real $3.10 buy_no FILLED 09:11). Retune toward the FLOOR (operator's active complaint): at bankroll $1290, 0.02 lands f*0.19->$4.9, typical f*0.40->$10.3, high f*0.55->$14.2, rare f*0.69->$17.8. Prioritizes thin edges clearing ~$5 over capping the rare high-f* at $15: the live f* range 0.19-0.69 (3.6x) exceeds the $5-15 envelope (3x), so no single scalar fits both ends; a rare >$15 is acceptable vs the prior $56-80 oversize. FINAL fractional-Kelly layer; composes with cash sizing base, portfolio-heat, correlation, DeltaU concavity.
sizing._max_single_position_pct_note: 2026-06-09 operator directive: NO concentration CAP. A hard dollar/percent cap is NOT the system's sizing mechanism and BREAKS Kelly (it overrides the structural portfolio-heat + correlation + DeltaU-concavity attenuation that the K4/K5/K6 relationship tests enforce) -- same one-off-cap anti-pattern as the deleted tiny_live. 0.0 disables the ceiling on BOTH money_path_adapters.evaluate_kelly AND the bin-selection DeltaU choke point. Position size is determined SOLELY by the layered fractional Kelly: kelly_multiplier(0.125) x cash-sizing-base x portfolio-heat-attenuation x correlation-reduction x DeltaU-marginal-log-utility-with-existing-exposure. The proving-phase ~$5-15 envelope comes from the small 0.125 fractional Kelly on a ~$1k wallet, NOT a cap. Revisit kelly_multiplier (not a cap) after the first forward-settled fills.

exit._divergence_soft_threshold_note: HARDCODED. Soft divergence trigger requires confirmation from adverse market velocity. Replace after replay + live divergence audit.
exit._divergence_hard_threshold_note: HARDCODED. Hard divergence panic threshold. Replace after replay + live divergence audit.
exit._divergence_velocity_confirm_note: HARDCODED. Minimum adverse 1h market velocity required to confirm soft divergence panic.
exit._fee_rate_note: T6.4 HoldValue fee estimate uses polymarket_fee(best_bid, fee_rate); 0.05 matches execution_price.py:130 default (calibrated against Polymarket fee schedule). HARDCODED — revisit after observed-exit-fee corpus stabilizes.
exit._daily_hurdle_rate_note: T6.4 opportunity-cost rate per day of locked capital (0.01%/day ≈ 3.65%/year conservative hurdle). HARDCODED — replace with live-readiness B3 derived value once realized-return corpus exceeds 100 settlements.
exit._correlation_crowding_rate_note: T6.4-phase2 correlation-crowding cost rate. Cost model: crowding_cost_usd = rate × correlated_exposure_ratio × shares × best_bid. rate=0.01 means 1% of exit notional per unit of correlated exposure across other held positions. Default 0.0 = no-op (safe default — feature-flag OFF preserves pre-T6.4-phase2 behavior even when HOLD_VALUE_EXIT_COSTS flips ON). Operator raises after T6.3-followup-1 replay audit measures should_exit sensitivity. HARDCODED until live-readiness B3 corpus.

settlement._disagreement_tolerance_note: Max absolute difference (°C) between settlement_value (UMA-resolved) and observation_value (WU-derived) to classify as SOURCE_DISAGREEMENT rather than genuine obs_outside_bin. Added 2026-05-08 for fix #263.

feature_flags._qkernel_spine_enabled_note: Q-KERNEL REBUILD WAVE 5B CUTOVER FLAG (2026-06-14). DEFAULT FALSE. When OFF, the live reactor per-family DECISION (q via _live_yes_probabilities + selection/sizing via _select_proof_by_robust_marginal_utility) is byte-for-byte the legacy path; the rebuilt spine is never on the decision path. When ON, the per-family decision is computed by the rebuilt q-kernel spine (src/decision/family_decision_engine.decide(): predictive_distribution -> joint_q -> joint_q_band -> family_book -> market_coherence -> negrisk_routes -> payoff_vector -> filter[direction, coherence, edge_lcb>0 & delta_u>0] -> argmax optimal_delta_u), and FamilyDecision.selected is mapped back onto the SAME _CandidateProof shape the submission pipeline (RiskGuard, freshness, MECE fail-closed, venue submission, receipts, decision_receipt_spine) already consumes — the submission pipeline is unchanged. The legacy authorities (EDLI bias correction, scalar trade_score selector, binary Kelly, 1-q_ucb_yes NO LCB, market_anchor) stay INERT for rollback (Stage 11 removes them). This is the cutover/rollback switch the orchestrator flips at deploy; rolling it back restores the legacy path with no code change. Read via the SAME settings["feature_flags"] accessor as the other reactor flags. Wiring: src/engine/qkernel_spine_bridge.py (the bridge), inserted at the _generate_candidate_proofs/_selected_candidate_proof orchestration seam in src/engine/event_reactor_adapter.py.
feature_flags._exit_bias_family_unify_FLIP_2026_06_12: FLIPPED ON (operator word 全执行 + unshadow gate met: docs/evidence/exit_path_replay/2026-06-12_bias_family_unify_before_after.md — 74 VERIFIED edli_per_city_v1 rows/50 cities replayed on real member arrays; settled-truth 6 improved/2 degraded (both Istanbul pnl=0 mild-cold); dominant COLD bias 46/74 rows = exit was over-stating p_no exactly on the loss class; fail-closed on missing row). Exit belief now matches entry belief (bias-shift-only + identity-Platt, A4 lockstep). Watch first Istanbul exits post-flip.
feature_flags._exit_bias_family_unify_enabled_note: D2 bias-family entry/exit unify is LIVE. It closes the D2 asymmetry by making evaluator-FT and monitor read the same edli_per_city_v1 family and A4 lockstep treatment used by entry: bias-shift-ONLY plus identity-Platt, with no residual widening on the shifted domain. This keeps entry and exit belief on one live belief surface. FAIL-CLOSED: no VERIFIED edli_per_city_v1 row for the bucket -> plain p_raw + real Platt, trading continues without fabricating a corrected value. Authority/evidence: docs/evidence/exit_path_replay/2026-06-12_bias_family_unify_before_after.md.
feature_flags._HOLD_VALUE_EXIT_COSTS_note: FLIPPED ON 2026-06-12 (operator word '需要测试的现在就测试好，然后依次全执行' + replay verdict docs/evidence/exit_path_replay/2026-06-12_canonical_vs_legacy.md): 3052 monitor refreshes replayed, 72 divergences in 3 positions, all canonical=sell-permit on the belief≈bid knife edge; settled truth 0 winners sold / 18 loser-exits / +20.70 USD net; monotone (canonical net_value <= legacy, can only permit MORE exits). CANONICAL_EXIT_PATH verified pure settlement-bookkeeping routing (mark_settled wraps compute_settlement_close; identical P&L). Legacy zero-cost branch deletion = Wave 2 follow-up.
feature_flags._BUY_NO_NATIVE_QUOTE_EVIDENCE_note: LIVE REQUIRED. Buy-no candidates must be priced from native NO-token quote evidence and may submit only when that evidence is present. This is not a shadow tier; missing native NO quote evidence disables the buy-no leg.
feature_flags._ddd_v2_enabled_note: Two-Rail Data Density Discount (RERUN_PLAN_v2.md §5 D-E live wiring 2026-05-03). Rail 1 HALT for cov<0.35; Rail 2 linear discount D=min(0.09, 0.20×shortfall). F2 fail-CLOSED on NO_TRAIN_DATA / EXCLUDED / unconfigured cities → rejection_stage='DDD_NO_TRAIN_DATA' / 'DDD_EXCLUDED_WORKSTREAM_A' / 'DDD_CITY_UNCONFIGURED'. Default ON. Disable to revert to pre-DDD-v2 behavior (oracle_penalty.py only) without code change.
feature_flags._calibration_bin_source_v2_fit_enabled_n: FIX-1 (2026-06-03) is LIVE. get_decision_group_count and _fit_from_pairs both filter by CANONICAL_CALIBRATION_PAIR_BIN_SOURCE (canonical_v2), so the count gate and fit query one identical population. This prevents all-v2 LOW/HIGH buckets from silently borrowing a foreign cluster's Platt transform when their own canonical_v2 calibration rows exist.
